strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Direct AI-agent and MCP tooling work at current role aligns with required AI agent development
Strong testing/TDD background including workshops, dojos, and craftsmanship practices
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in stack or projects
Limited demonstrated depth with cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) and Kubernetes beyond brief mentions
No Kotlin experience; Java exposure appears dated (robotic arms, 2016-2018)
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with well over the required 6 years, strong TypeScript/Node/React foundations, active AI-agent infrastructure work, and a clear craftsmanship and testing culture that matches the role's quality expectations. Gaps exist around Nest.js, Kotlin, and explicit cloud/Kubernetes depth, but the breadth of languages and systems suggests these are learnable. Overall a solid technical match for an internal automation tooling team.
